first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in full-stack and open-source development and consistently point out the same weaknesses regarding C++, industrial automation, and specific security standards. The minor differences in wording are attributable to normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest the model relied on the redacted name or personal URLs for its assessment.
